title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python scripts.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; simple wrapper over Ollama HTTP API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain (chat, embeddings, tool-calling).

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI for model management, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: llama-cpp-ollama
summary: Experiment to run llama.cpp backends inside Ollama for faster CPU inference.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Starter repo for retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that exposes Ollama models to Discord servers with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for JavaScript/TypeScript developers to integrate Ollama locally.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM chats and summarization inside your vault using Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: DBeaver plugin that adds SQL query generation and explanation via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Template repo showing how to wrap Ollama with FastAPI for extra auth, logging, and rate limits.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin for local AI summarization and Q&A on your knowledge graph using Ollama.

title: ollama-minecraft
summary: Spigot plugin bringing LLM-powered NPCs and chat commands to Minecraft servers via Ollama.

title: ollama-homeassistant
summary: Home Assistant custom component for local LLM automation and voice assistant using Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API with serde types.
